Welcome to Western Willow University (WWU)!

WWU is an all-girls school (if you're RPing from a male pov you'll have been the first man accepted into WWU)

WWU is considered one of the most prestigious schools to be able to attend, and due to your smarts you were accepted.

However, it has one major drawback: it has no bathroom facilities whatsoever.

Even worse, the professors seem to enjoy making their students suffer. Can you survive without ruining a pair of pants?
